response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience across multiple domains, with strong TypeScript, React, and Node.js skills. His work on scalable platforms, databases (MongoDB, SQL), and DevOps (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS) aligns well with the role's requirements. While his recent career gap and focus on AI-agent infrastructure may raise minor concerns, his proven track record in pragmatic software development and clean architecture makes him a strong candidate.
strengths: Deep fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js
Proven ability to build scalable, testable, and user-focused solutions
Strong DevOps and cloud experience (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS, Terraform)
concerns: Recent career gap may require clarification
Experience with PostgreSQL is not explicitly mentioned
High on-site presence requirement may not align with personal circumstances
